title: Washing Machine Drum Paddle 213x55x43 mm with the Original Code 00669833 669833 for Bosch for Balay for Constructa for Koenic for Siemens - MADE IN EU - Warranty 10 Years - MONTERAL
features: Washing machine drum paddle with original codes 00669833 669833 for Bosch, for Balay, for Constructa, for Koenic, for Pitsos, for Profilo, for Siemens, for Viva, for Zelmer.

The drum paddle has a length of 213 mm, a width of 55 mm, and a height of 43 mm. The number of holes is 9. Made from durable plastic and designed to be securely fastened to the washing machine drum using 6 fasteners.
The drum rib is an important component of a washing machine as it helps to ensure that clothes are washed thoroughly by allowing water and detergent to penetrate and clean the fibres of the fabric.

It is important to replace the drum rib in good time if it is damaged, as this affects the performance of the washing machine and can cause damage to the garments during washing. It should also be cleaned and inspected regularly.
When replacing the drum paddle, it is important to use a compatible part designed specifically for your washing machines model to ensure correct fit and function.
